_comment: Single source of truth for desktop-build.sh and desktop-quit.sh. Copy this file to scripts/app-it.config.json and customize. Both scripts read it; APPS-table drift (where they had separate copies) is structurally impossible.

_fields.name: Display name. Non-ASCII OK (e.g. 'Momó Studio'). The build script will substitute this verbatim into Info.plist's CFBundleName and the bundle's directory name.
_fields.slug: File-safe slug. Lowercase, hyphens. Used for assets/<slug>-icon.png plus namespaced app-it runtime and log paths.
_fields.port: Preferred frontend port. With port_mode 'fallback' (default), the launcher tries this first, then scans [port..port+50] for a free port. With port_mode 'fixed', this exact port is required and launch refuses fallback so browser storage stays tied to one origin. Records actual runtime port to ~/Library/Application Support/app-it/<slug>/server.port.
_fields.port_mode: Optional: 'fallback' (default) or 'fixed'. Use 'fixed' only when browser storage, OAuth callbacks, or project config must stay on exactly http://localhost:<port>.
_fields.start_command: Command to start the dev server, run from PROJECT_ROOT. Must honor PORT env var. Vite needs --port via CLI: 'npm run dev -- --port $PORT'. Avoid hardcoded -p literals — use direct framework binaries like 'pnpm exec next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT' when package scripts wrap or hardcode Next flags.
_fields.bundle_id: Reverse-DNS bundle identifier. Default 'com.user.<slug>'. NEVER 'com.<your-mac-username>.*' — LaunchServices may reject with error -600.
_fields.version: Marketing version. Doesn't matter for unsigned use; pick anything semver-shaped.
_fields.polyfill_path: Optional absolute path to a JS polyfill file (FSA shim). Use @ROOT@ to reference the repo root: '@ROOT@/assets/<slug>-polyfill.js'. Empty string when no polyfill is needed.
_fields.backend_port: Optional. Set for A3.2 multi-server cohabiting apps. The backend service's preferred port. The launcher allocates a free port starting here for the backend, exports it as API_PORT to both processes.
_fields.backend_start_command: Optional. The command to start the backend service. Must honor API_PORT env var. The frontend dev server (e.g. Vite) must proxy to http://localhost:$API_PORT (config edits required — see SKILL.md A3.2 section).
_fields.external_url: Optional. When set, desktop-build.sh creates a URL-only launcher and ignores port/start_command/backend fields. Use this for published/shared Claude Artifact URLs so each user signs into Claude with their own plan. Aliases accepted: artifact_url, url.
